improvement_hint: Demote DMO portal generic pages; canonical block already nails the answer (Tofukuji/Eikando/Tanzan etc).
May koyo does not exist; tool should surface a temporal-impossibility note and pivot to fresh-green/shinryoku alternatives.
Wrong tool (Japan Heritage) for an Ise Jingu detail query; Ise Jingu surfaced via see_also but get_entity_full would be far stronger.
Excess unrelated canonical blocks (Kansai koyo/sakura) crowd the response; gate by query intent so Ise family query gets family/Ise-only blocks.
canonical_last_mile_transport directly answers Oirase bus-only access; could add JR bus 'Mizuumi-go' branding + Aomori-Hachinohe choice rule.
Only 5 hotels; crater-view / honeymoon-suite tagging absent. Add canonical_luxury_ryokan for Aso (e.g. 山みず木, 蘇山郷) and crater_view flag.
Beppu hits in results but canonical block surfaces non-Beppu onsen towns; add a canonical_beppu_hells / Beppu-specific block.
User asked about kaiseki cuisine experience; MAFF GI returned ingredients only. Add canonical_kaiseki_restaurants block with Michelin-listed kaiseki houses or yuba/tofu specialty foods.
Late-November late-koyo intent should fire a canonical_late_koyo block (Hakone, Atami, southern Kyushu, Kamakura) instead of mixed early-foliage results.
canonical_family_friendly_destinations covers it (Asahiyama Zoo, Northern Horse Park, North Safari); spots[] empty is acceptable. Add Noboribetsu Bear Park for completeness.
Strong canonical halal block (Naritaya Gion / Ayam-YA / Osaka Namba Masjid); could prune Hokkaido entries since query asked Kyoto/Osaka only.
User asked private-bath couple ryokan; response returned municipal-admin pages (Wi-Fi, LINE account). Pivot to get_hotels with kashikiri/family-bath canonical block.
User wanted cheap Sapporo eats under 1000 yen; GI products (Yubari melon etc) don't answer it. Add canonical_cheap_eats / 二条市場 / スープカレー / 札幌ラーメン横丁 block.
canonical_festivals nails Gion Matsuri; national_heritage adds context. national_heritage_note correctly disclaims non-prefecture scope.
Koyasan shukubo list is canonical answer; could include English website for booking and shojin-ryori meal note.
Excellent not_found handling for fictional 夢幻県; clear suggestion to clarify. Localization to zh applied.
NHK Taiga filming-location query needs a canonical_drama_locations block (e.g. Nijo Castle, Honno-ji, Kyoto Studio Park 太秦映画村, Toei Kyoto Studio); not covered today.
canonical_family_friendly_destinations covers Kurumayama / Venus Line / Kamikochi; could add 乳幼児 (under-2) specific note for stroller surfaces.
Kodaiji night-illumination is the couple-specific anchor; could promote it higher and add 円山公園 / 哲学の道 for romantic walk.
canonical_anime_pilgrimage_destinations correctly cites Hida-Furukawa Station & Kida-Wakamiya for Your Name; could add Kataware-doki spot 飛騨市図書館 & Suga Shrine stairway (Tokyo).
Kumejima-tsumugi (meti_densan:0126) returned with description but workshop-visit info absent; add 久米島紬の里 ユイマール館 spot link.
Returned Imari/Sagayamato/Wataya-besso etc; Ureshino-onsen ryokan (e.g. 大正屋, 萬象閉) missing despite being the specific town asked. City filter would help; add canonical_ureshino_onsen block.
Rain/indoor intent not honored — response surfaces sakura/koyo blocks. Add canonical_kyoto_indoor block (museums, Kyoto Rail Museum, Nishiki Market, Kyoto Aquarium).
User asked Fukuoka yatai under 500 yen; response returned GI products & Kitakyushu pages. Add canonical_fukuoka_yatai block (Nakasu yatai, Tenjin yatai, typical menu/price ranges).
Ehime mikan / 紅まどんな / せとか mentioned in scraped pages; add canonical_ehime_citrus block enumerating 伊予柑 / 甘平 / せとか / 紅まどんな / デコポン varieties.
